The '''2019 season''' was the '''[[Castleford Tigers]]'''' 94th season in the [[Rugby Football League]] and their 12th consecutive season in the top flight of [[Rugby league in England|English rugby league]]. The club competed in the [[2019 Super League season|2019 Super League]] and the [[2019 Challenge Cup]].

=== Dual registration ===

Castleford also agreed a [[RFL dual registration|dual registration]] arrangement with [[Halifax R.L.F.C.]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].<ref>{{Cite news |last=Shaw |first=Matthew |date=31 January 2019 |title=Halifax confirm two dual-registration links |url=https://www.totalrl.com/halifax-confirm-two-dual-registration-links/ |access-date=5 June 2024 |work=TotalRL}}</ref>
